blocks.text: This Refund Policy explains how refunds are handled for purchases made on https://voidborn.fun (the "Website") and the Voidborn platform (the "Platform"), operated by PRODEC LTD.

blocks.name: PRODEC LTD
blocks.address: 196 High Road, Wood Green, London, England, N22 8HH

blocks.text: This policy should be read together with our Terms and Conditions. Where there is a conflict between this policy and mandatory consumer protection law, applicable law will prevail.
1. Digital Content and Final Sales

Voidborn provides digital content and digital gameplay-related services, including virtual cards, credit packs, boxes, packs, and other in-platform purchases. Because delivery is immediate once content is credited to your Account, all purchases are generally final and non-refundable after delivery.
By completing a purchase and receiving digital content in your Account, you acknowledge that delivery has begun and that statutory cancellation rights may be limited where permitted by law.
2. When Refunds May Be Considered
We may consider a refund only in limited circumstances, including where:

items: a verified technical issue prevented delivery of the purchased content;
you were charged twice for the same transaction;
an unauthorised payment is confirmed after our review;
we determine, at our discretion, that a refund is necessary to correct a genuine billing or delivery error.

blocks.text: Refund requests must be submitted promptly with sufficient information to investigate the issue, including your Account email, transaction date, and order details.
3. What Is Not Refundable
Refunds are generally not available for:

items: virtual items, cards, or credits already delivered and visible in your Account;
purchases made in error after successful delivery;
dissatisfaction with randomised pack or box contents, where contents were delivered as described;
gameplay outcomes, rankings, or in-game progress;
internal shop transactions completed between users, except where required by law or where we reverse a transaction for fraud or technical error;
withdrawal fees or third-party bank or card charges.

blocks.text: 4. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, contact us at support@kingdomofarcane.com with your Account details, transaction information, and a clear description of the issue. We will review your request and respond within a reasonable time.
Approved refunds, where issued, will be returned to the original payment method where possible. Processing times depend on your bank, card issuer, or payment provider.
5. Chargebacks and Payment Disputes
If you believe a charge is incorrect, please contact us before initiating a chargeback or payment dispute. We will work with you to resolve legitimate issues.
You agree not to initiate unjustified chargebacks for valid, authorised transactions where digital content was delivered. Where a chargeback or dispute is filed in bad faith, we may:

items: reverse or remove associated Balance or Virtual Items;
recover losses, fees, and administrative costs to the extent permitted by law.

blocks.text: 6. Consumer Rights

If you are a consumer in a jurisdiction that grants mandatory withdrawal or refund rights for digital content, those rights apply only to the extent required by law and subject to lawful exceptions — including where digital delivery has begun with your prior express consent and acknowledgment that cancellation rights may be lost.
7. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Refund Policy from time to time. The current version will always be published on the Website with an updated "Last Updated" date.
8. Contact
For refund enquiries or billing questions, contact support@kingdomofarcane.com or use the company details above.
